chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2759 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 3. 2. For orders on Misc. No.12514/2025. 3. For orders on Misc. No.12518/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner. A Statement is available on record reflecting that this Petition is not being pressed. Under the given circumstances, the instant Petition stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith all pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
